description:
Verso: Legal document in Arabic script. Regarding the sale of an enslaved woman. Nāṣir b. ʿAlī b. Salmān is the buyer. Fragment (upper right corner). 

Recto: Probably also a legal document, written after recto was already torn. Mentions the name Manṣūr, and the enslaved woman. The two documents are most likely related. Needs further examination.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
